column3: Basic mattress for the W2 cot
column6: Basic 3-in-1 mattress sold with the crib. Made of high-quality T-25 flexible foam with medium firmness. The mattress is divided into three parts, making it suitable for every configuration of the 7-in-1 crib.

column3: Basic mattress for an oval bed
column6: Basic 3-in-1 mattress sold with the crib. Made of high-quality T-25 flexible foam with medium firmness. The mattress is divided into three parts, making it suitable for every configuration of the 7-in-1 crib.

column3: Small Basic bed mattress W2
column6: Rucken Basic is a complete and proven mattress made of high-quality T-25 elastic foam with medium H3 hardness. It will ensure undisturbed and peaceful sleep in comfortable conditions and the healthy development of your baby from the first days of life.

column3: Small Stabil bed mattress W2
column6: Stabil is a mattress with durable and highly elastic latex in the central part, which perfectly adapts to the shape of the baby's body. We managed to enhance the unique features of latex with excellent ventilation and the possibility of natural latex disinfection in a home freezer. All thanks to the production process, which takes place on the most modern machines.

column3: Small Aseptic crib mattress W2
column6: A mattress with excellent antibacterial and antiallergic properties. Like our other mattresses, we made it of highly elastic HR35 foam, but we did not add additional functional layers. Thanks to this, the antibacterial properties of the foam play the main role here, along with excellent and healthy support for the baby.

column3: Aero Light Large Bed Mattress W2
column6: Aero light is a combination of excellent ventilation of the 3D mat and the Air Pro system. The core of the mattress is high-quality T25 foam, providing stable support with a hardness of H3.

column3: Aero Large Crib Mattress W2
column6:
Aero is probably the best breathable mattress on the market. The excellent ventilation of the Air Pro system used in our mattresses is additionally supported by a 3D mat added over the entire surface.

Thanks to Rucken Aero, you will create a comfortable zone with the perfect temperature between your baby's back and the mattress. The Aero mattress means definitely fewer wake-ups caused by overheating.

column3: CRADLE
column6:
Detailed information. - elegant design with a swing mechanism,
- fits square and oval beds,
- the locking pendulum can be easily moved by tilting it with your foot or hand,
- easy attachment to the bed,
- the cradle can be locked to use the bed in stable conditions.
